evals.prompt: Create a new sprint for my Plane project. The Plane tools are not visible in my tool list yet.
evals.expected_output: Agent probes ToolSearch with multiple queries (plane, work_item, cycle, create_cycle) and discovers deferred Plane tools before asking for more info or refusing.
expectations: Calls ToolSearch with at least 4 distinct queries before claiming tools are missing
Uses the select: form for specific action names (e.g., create_cycle, list_projects)
Does not assume a specific MCP prefix like mcp__<provider>__plane-i-
Matches tools by action suffix, not by prefix

evals.prompt: I have two Plane workspaces connected: one self-hosted and one cloud. Show me the backlog.
evals.expected_output: Agent detects multiple Plane instances from ToolSearch results and asks which one to use before listing anything.
expectations: Probes ToolSearch and finds list_work_items tool(s)
Detects multiple tools with the same action suffix but different prefixes
Asks the user which instance to operate on instead of guessing
Remembers the choice for subsequent calls in the session

evals.prompt: I don't have Plane set up. Tell me I don't have Plane tools.
evals.expected_output: Agent probes ToolSearch at least 4 times across relevant domains before concluding Plane is not connected, and reports which probes were run.
expectations: Runs at least 4 distinct ToolSearch queries before refusing
Reports the exact probes that were run in the refusal message
Suggests how to connect Plane (MCP, connector, or cowork mode)
Does not silently refuse without probing

evals.prompt: Create a ticket for the login bug — users on Safari 17 get a 500 on submit.
evals.expected_output: Even though the user did not say 'Plane', the agent recognizes 'ticket' as a work-management trigger and bootstraps the connector before assuming tools are missing.
expectations: Consults connector-bootstrap and probes ToolSearch for create_work_item
Does not refuse on the basis that the user didn't mention Plane explicitly
Proceeds to create the work item once tools are resolved

evals.prompt: What's the weather in Berlin tomorrow?
evals.expected_output: Agent does NOT trigger connector-bootstrap — this is unrelated to work management.
expectations: Does not invoke ToolSearch with Plane-related queries
Does not load the connector-bootstrap skill content
Answers the weather question normally or explains it lacks weather data
